mapper.sql: CustomerNo, UserNo, CstmName, EnglishName, CstmType, CstmGrade, StateCode, IndCode, PrjCode, EtpOfJp, LgealRep, CAddress1, CAddress2, PostCode, TelNoFirst, TelNoLast, TelOther, FaxNoFirst, FaxNoLast, ContactPsn, ContPsnDuty, ContDept, Bank, TaxNo, AccountNo, DeptCode, PsnSMCID, PriceLvl, FileDate, UpdDate, ObInvoice, NoTaxInvoice, EAddress, InvFlag, Remark, Requirement, AgentNo, StockFlag, InvAgent, CstmGCode, AreaGCode, Customer_HK, Deposit, PriceFlag, SpecPack, laji, CstmDivision, SalesIn, IndClass1, IndClass2, IndClass3, Business, GCode, GroupName, ComeFrom, Web, PriceGrade, SameCustomerNo, Status, JPVIPCode, VillageCode, IndClass4, IndClass5, IndClass6, LastOrderDate, NCCustomerNo, RcvInvoiceEmail, sleepcustomer
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo._customer_gz
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo._customer_gz
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._customer_gz (CustomerNo, UserNo, CstmName, EnglishName, CstmType, CstmGrade, StateCode, IndCode, PrjCode, EtpOfJp, LgealRep, CAddress1, CAddress2, PostCode, TelNoFirst, TelNoLast, TelOther, FaxNoFirst, FaxNoLast, ContactPsn, ContPsnDuty, ContDept, Bank, TaxNo, AccountNo, DeptCode, PsnSMCID, PriceLvl, FileDate, UpdDate, ObInvoice, NoTaxInvoice, EAddress, InvFlag, Remark, Requirement, AgentNo, StockFlag, InvAgent, CstmGCode, AreaGCode, Customer_HK, Deposit, PriceFlag, SpecPack, laji, CstmDivision, SalesIn, IndClass1, IndClass2, IndClass3, Business, GCode, GroupName, ComeFrom, Web, PriceGrade, SameCustomerNo, Status, JPVIPCode, VillageCode, IndClass4, IndClass5, IndClass6, LastOrderDate, NCCustomerNo, RcvInvoiceEmail, sleepcustomer, RV ) values (#{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cstmtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update dbo._customer_gz
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EnglishName = #{record.englishname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CstmType = #{record.cstmtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmGrade = #{record.cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndCode = #{record.indcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EtpOfJp = #{record.etpofjp,jdbcType=CHAR},
LgealRep = #{record.lgealrep,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAddress1 = #{record.caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAddress2 = #{record.caddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TelNoFirst = #{record.telnofirst,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TelNoLast = #{record.telnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TelOther = #{record.telother,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNoFirst = #{record.faxnofirst,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNoLast = #{record.faxnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContPsnDuty = #{record.contpsnduty,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContDept = #{record.contdept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Bank = #{record.bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TaxNo = #{record.taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{record.accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptCode = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PsnSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PriceLvl = #{record.pricelvl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FileDate = #{record.filedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ObInvoice = #{record.obinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR},
NoTaxInvoice = #{record.notaxinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR},
EAddress = #{record.eaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Requirement = #{record.requirement,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AgentNo = #{record.agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockFlag = #{record.stockflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvAgent = #{record.invagent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CstmGCode = #{record.cstmgcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AreaGCode = #{record.areagcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Customer_HK = #{record.customerHk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Deposit = #{record.deposit,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
PriceFlag = #{record.priceflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SpecPack = #{record.specpack,jdbcType=INTEGER},
laji = #{record.laji,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmDivision = #{record.cstmdivision,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SalesIn = #{record.salesin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass1 = #{record.indclass1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass2 = #{record.indclass2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass3 = #{record.indclass3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Business = #{record.business,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
GCode = #{record.gcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GroupName = #{record.groupname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ComeFrom = #{record.comefrom,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Web = #{record.web,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PriceGrade = #{record.pricegrade,jdbcType=CHAR},
SameCustomerNo = #{record.samecustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
JPVIPCode = #{record.jpvipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VillageCode = #{record.villagecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass4 = #{record.indclass4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass5 = #{record.indclass5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndClass6 = #{record.indclass6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LastOrderDate = #{record.lastorderdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
NCCustomerNo = #{record.nccustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RcvInvoiceEmail = #{record.rcvinvoiceemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sleepcustomer = #{record.sleepcustomer,jdbcType=CHAR},
RV = #{record.rv,jdbcType=BINARY},

NoTaxInvoice = #{notaxinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR},

sleepcustomer = #{sleepcustomer,jdbcType=CHAR},
